title: UNION of NULLs with several tables fails
poc: CREATE TABLE g AS SELECT NULL AS j UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS j UNION ALL SELECT 'asdf' AS j WITH DATA;
key_bug_features: UNION of NULLs with multiple tables fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id INT, value VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id INT, value VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table1 (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test1'), (2, NULL), (3, 'test3');
INSERT INTO test_table2 (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 'test2');
SELECT NULL AS j UNION ALL SELECT value FROM test_table1 UNION ALL SELECT value FROM test_table2;
